title: E R C721 Token
content:
- ### OntologyBlock
- ## About ERC-721 Token
  - CryptoKitties, Bored Ape Yacht Club, ENS domains
  - Proposed by William Entriken, Dieter Shirley, Jacob Evans, Nastassia Sachs in January 2018.

ontology.definition: A non-fungible token implementing the ERC-721 standard, a free, open standard for building unique tokens on Ethereum blockchain with trackable ownership via token identification numbers and ownerOf function.
